mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_no, name, gender, type, department, first_use_date, is_deleted, created_at FROM employees WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, employee_no, name, gender, type, department, first_use_date, is_deleted, created_at FROM employees WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY name LIMIT 20
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (employee_no, name, gender, type, department, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{type}, #{department}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE employees SET first_use_date = #{firstUseDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) FROM employees e INNER JOIN residences r ON r.employee_id = e.id AND r.status = 'active' WHERE e.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND type = #{type}
mapper.sql: SELECT e.id, e.employee_no, e.name, e.gender, e.type, e.department, e.first_use_date, e.created_at, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'active' ELSE 'none' END AS residence_status FROM employees e LEFT JOIN residences r ON r.employee_id = e.id AND r.status = 'active' WHERE e.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
AND (e.employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

AND (e.employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY e.name LIMIT 20
